query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A top-down view of a wine glass with a round wooden stopper resting on its rim, shot against a pale blue and white background. The glass stem and bowl curve gracefully below the stopper, with soft circular bands of blue and white radiating outward from the center of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A top-down view of a wine glass with a round wooden stopper resting on its rim, rendered with heavy radial blur that softens the glass stem and bowl into indistinct swirling bands of pale blue and white. The image has low color saturation with muted, washed-out tones, and fine details of the glass texture and background dissolve into smooth, smeared gradients, leaving only the stopper with any recognizable definition.
